response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed the video timeline: 00:00-01:58 is talking/announcements; 01:59-04:14 is the performance of 'FASHIONBEAT'.
2. Identified 'FASHIONBEAT' by Sakura Miko from on-screen text.
3. Used the search tool to find the official Japanese lyrics for 'FASHIONBEAT' by Sakura Miko.
4. Found the lyrics and provided both Japanese and English translation in the scene data.
response.global_summary: A video consisting of a promotional talk segment featuring Sakura Miko, followed by a music video performance of her song 'FASHIONBEAT'.

scenes.description: Sakura Miko speaks directly to the camera about various announcements, with background instrumental music.
A full vocal performance of the song 'FASHIONBEAT' by Sakura Miko, featured in an animated music video.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Even if it hurts and I close my eyes,
I can still hear it, the anxiety show.
Since worrying won't change anything,
I guess I have to just do it, after all.
If I'm going to break, I'd rather break in a way that's easy to fix.
What kind of shape can I aim for?
A jump without a run-up,
A dive without a safety line,
I really want to praise myself for today, don't I?
I want to breathe, I want to resonate more,
Hey, maybe I can see something beyond myself.
My imagination won't stop.
Want to try sniffing out a fashion beat?
I can't just say 'whatever' to my dreams.
Is it me myself who will fulfill them?
Or should I leave it to someone else?
I just, just want to win against myself.
New fashion beat, devouring love,
I won't accept losing, it has no taste.
Evolution that turns to ash, again and again,
Personification of a reborn bug.
I'm not, I'm not going to rot away yet,
No, not at all.
What keeps pricking at me,
I'm already sick of it.
Sorry, all those annoying word games,
Please, just put them away properly.
I am my own rival, that's an obvious interpretation,
Even though I know what I should do.
A jump without a run-up,
A dive without a safety line,
'I don't feel like I can do it today,'
Isn't it impossible to say I don't care?
Hey, even if I compare myself to others,
Isn't it just boring as hell?
Want to try sniffing out a fashion beat?
I can't just say 'whatever' to my dreams.
Is it me myself who will fulfill them?
Or should I leave it to someone else?
I just, just want to win against myself.
New fashion beat, devouring love,
I won't accept losing, it has no taste.
Evolution that turns to ash, again and again,
Personification of a reborn bug.
I'm not, I'm not going to rot away yet,
No, not at all.
I can't stop,
It's not anyone else, it's me myself.
Personification of a reborn bug,
I'm not, I'm not going to scatter yet,
No, not at all.
